classes.label: 1 km
classes.note: World record ~2:11 (men). Relative to trained runners.

classes.label: 2 km
classes.note: World record ~4:44. Relative to trained runners.

classes.label: 3 km
classes.note: World record ~7:20 (men).

classes.label: 5 km
classes.note: Based on 736,928 race results — avg finish 34:29. Top 30% break 30:00, top 10% break 27:00, top 1% sub-18:40.

classes.label: 10 km
classes.note: Top 40% of 10K finishers break 1 hour.

classes.label: 15 km
classes.note: World record ~41:05 (Kenenisa Bekele).

classes.label: Half Marathon (21.1 km)
classes.note: Median men 1:59, women 2:24. Top 10% men sub-1:47, top 1% men sub-1:18.

classes.label: Marathon (42.2 km)
classes.note: Median ~4:20–4:30. Top 25% under 3:55. Based on 107M+ race results.

classes.label: 25 km Ultra
classes.note: World record ~1:11:28.

classes.label: 50 km Ultra
classes.note: World record ~2:43:38.

classes.label: 100 km Ultra
classes.note: World record ~6:33:11.

classes.label: 100 m
classes.note: World record 9.58s (Bolt). Relative to trained sprinters.

classes.label: 200 m
classes.note: World record 19.19s (Bolt).

classes.label: 400 m
classes.note: World record 43.03s.

classes.label: ELO Rating
classes.note: Chess.com median ~500, Lichess median ~1400 (different scales). FIDE: 2200+ = FIDE Master, 2500+ = GM. Use either platform — Lichess runs ~200–300pts higher.

ranks.label: First steps — Chess.com under 800 / Lichess under 1000

classes.label: Words Per Minute (WPM)
classes.note: Average office typist 40 WPM. Touch-typist 60–80. Competitive 120+. TypeRacer / Monkeytype data.

classes.label: Act Rank
classes.note: Iron ~35%, Bronze ~25%, Silver ~20%, Gold ~12%, Platinum ~5%, Diamond ~2%, Ascendant ~0.7%, Radiant ~0.03%. Riot Games data.

classes.label: Ranked Tier
classes.note: ~150M players. Iron–Bronze ~40%, Silver ~25%, Gold ~20%, Platinum ~10%, Diamond ~2%, Master+ ~0.5%. Riot Games.

classes.label: CS2 / FACEIT Rating
classes.note: CS2 Premier Rating. FACEIT ELO 500–4000. Valve / ESIC data.

classes.label: Trophy Road
classes.note: 14,000 trophies = max Trophy Road. Path of Legends eligible at 13,000.

classes.label: Path of Legends
classes.note: Seasonal — rank stored as all-time max so season resets don't drop user rank. 10 tiers: Challenger I-III, Master I-III, Champion, Grand Champion, Royal Champion, Ultimate Champion.
